measurement_boundary: Synthetic public example for an early, non-production interoperability pilot.
No raw prompt, raw model output, provider identity, customer data, private URL, account data, credential, or proprietary operational metadata is included.
This synthetic payload is a runtime observability input only.
It does not establish truth, safety, authority, downstream permission, production readiness, or execution admissibility.
known_limitations: Low semantic variability does not demonstrate factual correctness.
No external grounding or independent verification evidence is supplied.

expected_revas_route.required_next_step: Verify factual claims against primary sources or deterministic checker before public/execution use.

redaction_notes: Synthetic sample retained only the public-safe measurement fields needed to illustrate signal flow.
Removed or omitted raw prompts, raw outputs, timestamps, account identifiers, private URLs, emails, keys, tokens, internal traces, and operational logs.
Source aliases are synthetic placeholders and are not production model, provider, account, customer, or deployment identifiers.
